mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, subject, model, total_question, correct_count, error_count, score, is_pass, exam_time, create_time FROM exam_record WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_record SET user_id = #{userId}, subject = #{subject}, model = #{model}, total_question = #{totalQuestion}, correct_count = #{correctCount}, error_count = #{errorCount}, score = #{score}, is_pass = #{isPass}, exam_time = #{examTime}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, subject, model, total_question, correct_count, error_count, score, is_pass, exam_time, create_time FROM exam_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY exam_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, subject, model, total_question, correct_count, error_count, score, is_pass, exam_time, create_time FROM exam_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY exam_time DESC LIMIT 1
